uia.t: abbr. Union of International Associations; Brussels <比>国际协会联合会

uic.t: abbr. ultraviolet image converter 紫外线光电变换器

uics.t: (uic 的复数) abbr. ultraviolet image converter 紫外线光电变换器

uid.t: abbr. 用户名（User Identifier）；用户界面设计（User Interface Design）

uie.t: abbr. UNESCO Institute for Education 联合国科教文组织教育研究所

uighur.t: n. 维吾尔族人, 维吾尔语, 维吾尔人
uighur.d:
n. a member of a people who speak Uighur and live in Xinjiang and adjacent areas
n. the Turkic language spoken by approximately 7,000,000 Uighur in extreme northwestern China
n. the script (derived from Aramaic) used to write the Uighur language

uighurs.t: (Uighur 的复数) n. 维吾尔族人, 维吾尔语, 维吾尔人
uighurs.d:
plural of Uighur
n. a member of a people who speak Uighur and live in Xinjiang and adjacent areas
n. the Turkic language spoken by approximately 7,000,000 Uighur in extreme northwestern China
n. the script (derived from Aramaic) used to write the Uighur language

uigur.t: n. 维吾尔族人, 维吾尔语, 维吾尔人
uigur.d:
n a member of a people who speak Uighur and live in Xinjiang and adjacent areas
n the Turkic language spoken by approximately 7,000,000 Uighur in extreme northwestern China
n the script (derived from Aramaic) used to write the Uighur language

uin.t: abbr. 通用国际互联网号码（Universal Internet Number）

uintatheriidae.d: n. an extinct family of Dinocerata

uintatherium.d:
n. An extinct genus of large Eocene ungulates allied to
   Dinoceras. This name is sometimes used for nearly all the known species
   of the group. See Dinoceras.

uis.t: abbr. urban industrial society 城市工业协会

uitlander.t: n. (南非的)外国人, 外侨

uits.t: abbr. unacknowledged information transfer service 未确认的信息传送业务; Unione Italiana Tiro e Segno (Italian=Italian Rifle Association) （意大利语）意大利来复枪协会
